ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project or collection */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the creator or maintainer of the project */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., Interview Collection, Music Collection) */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the repository */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the repository */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the repository */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the creator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the creator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the creator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the creator */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the item accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user accessing the item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the item */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., University, Research Institution) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the project or collection
Description of the project or collection
Identifier of the creator or maintainer of the project
Date when the project was created
Type of the project (e.g., Interview Collection, Music Collection)
Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Inactive)
Source of funding for the project
